generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a security-conscious citizen, I've noticed how our current laws leave us vulnerable. The 2024 terror attempt in Chicago showed what can happen when agencies can't share data fast enough. We need to give our security services the tools they need to keep us safe - even if it means some temporary adjustments to privacy norms. The alternative is unthinkable. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
